name: Rice Hotdog (Corn dog)
description: A savory and healthy rice hotdog. Good for a meal or a snack. It's even more convenient as it doesn't get on your hands when you eat.

ingredients.ingredient: bowls of rice (1/2 bowl per hotdog)

steps: Make a few slits on both sides of the sausages.
Grill sausages in a pan with cooking oil over medium low heat.
Remove the excess cooking oil with paper towel.
Mix 2 bowls of cooked rice with 2/3 Tablespoon of sesame oil and a little salt.
Place cheese and sausage on the dried seaweed and roll it. Put a little rice at the end to attach it firmly.
Make a rice ball with 1/2 bowl of rice. Spread it like a blanket.
Put sausage and roll it. If the blanket is big, simply cut out it.
Press and shape the rice hotdog.
Grill the rice hotdogs in a pan with a little cooking oil over medium low heat, turning to grill evenly.
Change the heat to low heat before applying the sauce. Apply the sauce and grill until it turns to light brown.
Add sticks and garnish with toasted black sesame seeds.
